_format: Phase N (Stage 1) new-species authoring. Each entry: id>=224 (first free $E0), info cloned from a base species with field overrides; enemy-stats cloned from a base EID; encounter-pool insertions; battle sprite/palette. Tool emits patches/bank_06a.asm (high info table + far-copy routine) and validates a byte-exact round-trip against the authored values.

info._note: Clone Dracky (sp78) info; family byte -> Slime (0).

enemy_stats._note: Clone the Slime (EID2, lvl1, recruitable, Slime-family-appropriate); species byte -> 224. NOT a Dracky clone (Dracky is locally modified in this ROM). Placed at $14:$7EB3 (= EID 518 * 25 + $4C1D) in bank $14 trailing free space; vanilla LoadEnemyStats addresses it with no code fork.

encounter._note: Gate of Beginning pool 0; fill empty slot 3.

battle_sprite._note: Battle gfx-ID + palette forked for ids>=224 in Milestone D.
